---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for open-teams
title: "[Feature] <short description>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## ✨ Feature Request

### Is your feature request related to a problem?

<!--
  A clear and concise description of what the problem is.
  Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"
  Example: "As a team lead, I need [...] to [...]
-->

### Describe the Solution You'd Like

<!--
  A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.
  What should the feature do? How should it work?
  If applicable, include:
  - CLI commands or API signatures
  - Example workflows
  - Mock-ups or diagrams
-->

### Describe Alternatives You've Considered

<!--
  Have you tried any workarounds? Are there existing tools
  that partially solve this? What makes open-teams the right
  place for this feature?
-->

### Who Would Benefit?

<!--
  Is this useful for solo devs, small teams, or large orgs?
  Would it help new users onboarding, or power users?
-->

### Additional Context

<!--
  Add any other context, references, or screenshots here.
  Links to similar features in other projects are welcome.
-->

### Willing to Contribute?

<!--
  If you're interested in implementing this yourself, let us know!
  We're happy to provide guidance and review.
-->

- [ ] I'd like to implement this feature myself
- [ ] I'd like help from maintainers to implement this

---

> 💡 **Tip:** Check [existing feature requests](https://github.com/struggling-bird/open-teams/issues?q=is%3Aissue+label%3Aenhancement) to see if someone already suggested something similar.
